blocks.text: Ødegaard fitness cloud hangs over Arsenal as Premier League title night arrives
Arsenal lead by 5 points but Ødegaard's fitness is in serious doubt for Brighton. City host Forest simultaneously — Wednesday's double-header could reshape the title race entirely. Watch both.
